benefits.description: Tirz made user feel full all the time and caused aversion to alcohol and junk food

side_effects.description: Reta made user hungry/want to snack constantly, including cravings for candy and junk food despite normally hating sweets
Reta raised resting heart rate significantly
Reta increased desire to drink alcohol

protocol_notes: User prefers Tirz over Reta due to side effect profile. Also advocates HGH as superior to GH secretagogue peptides for fat loss. Considers Reta expensive. User is considering stopping Reta.
